steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At $x=0$, the model should give the population in $2010$, which is $6{,}000$. In an exponential model, this starting value is the coefficient.

steps.title: Use the growth factor
steps.content: A $3\%$ annual increase means each year's population is multiplied by $$ 1+0.03=1.03 $$ After $x$ years, the model is $$ p=6{,}000(1.03)^x $$ The answer is D.
